library_preparation_preflight.summary: No extra Maven dependency, Docker image, environment variable, or system property is required. The artifact resolves its needed runtime dependencies transitively, and meaningful tests can cover command-line construction, output consumers, and local temp-repository behavior using the default `git` executable.
risks: The provider shells out to the `git` executable for real SCM operations, so tests that execute commands should avoid network remotes and use temporary local repositories.
If generated tests exercise commits or tags rather than only command construction/consumers, they may need to configure local git user.name and user.email inside the temporary repository.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8274 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.maven.scm:maven-scm-provider-gitexe:1.11.1; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015
